programme.desc: Chema, Tino y Jaime son tres hermanos que buscan salir de sus problemas robando el hipódromo en la Ciudad de México con la ayuda de sus socios, pero sin darse cuenta de que pronto van a tener que pelear por sus vidas y huir de su pasado.

programme.title: 500 balazos
programme.desc: Un importante criminal decide apoderarse de la plaza de un famoso narcotraficante, asesina a su hijo y provoca una guerra sangrienta entre sicarios.

programme.title: Barrio de narcos
programme.desc: En un barrio donde la lucha por el poder ha convertido la zona en un territorio sin ley, un par de policías honestos buscan desenmascarar a quien maneja los hilos negros del narcotráfico desde lo más alto del poder.

programme.title: El infierno
programme.desc: Benny se involucra en el negocio del narcotráfico después de que él es deportado de los Estados Unidos, y luego descubre que la vida criminal no es tan lucrativa como él lo esperaba.

programme.title: Perfectos desconocidos
programme.desc: Un grupo de amigos se reúne, durante un eclipse lunar, para compartir una cena íntima. Al principio, ellos creen que es solo otra noche más, hasta que la anfitriona propone un juego con sus teléfonos celulares.

programme.title: Lentes Carrera
programme.desc: Tras un periodo de estar retirado, Ángel del Villar retorna a las andadas cuando un grupo de sicarios busca matarlo sin motivo aparente.

programme.title: Misterio en Marbella
programme.desc: El fantasma de su esposa muerta arruina todas sus citas, sin embargo, un conserje está decidido a encontrar el amor nuevamente. Cuando se lleva a cabo una serie de robos en su edificio, forma un equipo con un vecino para encontrar al ladrón.

programme.title: Qué pena tu vida

programme.title: Ladrones

programme.title: Cosas imposibles

programme.title: No manches Frida 2

programme.title: La edad de la violencia

programme.desc: Hosts Mario Lopez, Kit Hoover, Scott Evans and Zuri Hall take viewers behind the velvet ropes and onto the red carpet to deliver celebrity interviews and entertainment news stories in Hollywood.

programme.title: Cindy Crawford talks about the latest breakthroughs in skincare
The Karate Kid
programme.desc: Daniel (Ralph Macchio) moves to Southern California with his mother, Lucille (Randee Heller), but quickly finds himself the target of a group of bullies who study karate at the Cobra Kai dojo. Fortunately, Daniel befriends Mr. Miyagi (Noriyuki "Pat" Morita), an unassuming repairman who just happens to be a martial arts master himself. Miyagi takes Daniel under his wing, training him in a more compassionate form of karate and preparing him to compete against the brutal Cobra Kai.

programme.title: WarGames
programme.desc: High school student David Lightman unwittingly hacks into a military supercomputer while searching for new video games. After starting a game of Global Thermonuclear War, Lightman leads the supercomputer to activate the nation's nuclear arsenal in response to his simulated threat as the Soviet Union. Once the clueless hacker comes to his senses, Lightman, with help from his girlfriend, must find a way to alert the authorities to stop the onset of World War III.

programme.title: Real Genius
programme.desc: When science whiz Mitch Taylor (Gabe Jarret) arrives at Pacific Tech as a freshman, he's paired up with genius senior Chris Knight (Val Kilmer) to work on a laser project. Mitch initially doesn't care for Knight's slacker attitude, but is eventually won over, and their friendship allows them to make new progress on the laser project. It's only when the boys learn that the government intends to use the laser as a weapon that they start to question what they've actually been working for.

programme.title: Up in Smoke
programme.desc: An unemployed pot-smoking slacker and amateur drummer, Anthony Stoner (Tommy Chong) ditches his strict parents and hits the road, eventually meeting kindred spirit Pedro de Pacas (Cheech Marin). While the drug-ingesting duo is soon arrested for possession of marijuana, Anthony and Pedro get released on a technicality, allowing them to continue their many misadventures and ultimately compete in a rock band contest, where they perform the raucous tune "Earache My Eye."

programme.title: Dazed and Confused
programme.desc: This coming-of-age film follows the mayhem of a group of rowdy teenagers in Austin, Texas, celebrating the last day of high school in 1976. The graduating class heads for a popular pool hall and joins an impromptu keg party, however star football player Randall Pink Floyd has promised to focus on the championship game and abstain from partying. Meanwhile, the incoming freshmen try to avoid being hazed by the seniors, most notably the sadistic bully Fred O'Bannion.

programme.title: Animal House
programme.desc: When they arrive at college, socially inept freshmen Larry (Thomas Hulce) and Kent (Stephen Furst) attempt to pledge the snooty Omega Theta Pi House, but are summarily rejected. Lowering their standards, they try at the notoriously rowdy Delta Tau Chi House, and get in. The trouble is, the college dean (John Vernon) has it in for the Deltas. He has put them on "Double Secret Probation" and secretly assigned Omega's president (James Daughton) the task of having their charter revoked.

programme.title: The Blues Brothers
programme.desc: After his release from prison, Jake (John Belushi) reunites with his brother, Elwood (Dan Aykroyd) -- collectively known as the "Blues Brothers." Jake's first task is to save the orphanage the brothers grew up in from closing, by raising $5,000 to pay back taxes. The two are convinced they can earn the money by getting their old band back together. However, after playing several gigs and making a few enemies, including the police, the brothers face daunting odds to deliver the money on time.

programme.title: Fast Times at Ridgemont High
programme.desc: Stacy Hamilton (Jennifer Jason Leigh) is a pretty, but inexperienced, teen interested in dating. Given advice by her uninhibited friend, Linda Barrett (Phoebe Cates), Stacy gets trapped in a love triangle with nice guy Mark Ratner (Brian Backer) and his more assured buddy Mike Damone (Robert Romanus). Meanwhile, Stacy's classmate Jeff Spicoli (Sean Penn), who lives for surfing and being stoned, faces off against Mr. Hand (Ray Walston), a strict teacher who has no time for the slacker's antics.

programme.desc: High school student David Lightman unwittingly hacks into a military supercomputer while searching for new video games. programme.title: National Lampoon's Vacation
programme.desc: Accompanied by their children, Clark Griswold and his wife, Ellen, are driving from Illinois to a California amusement park. As Clark increasingly fixates on a beautiful woman driving a sports car, the Griswolds deal with car problems and the death of a family member. They reach Los Angeles, but, when Clark worries that the trip is being derailed again, he acts impulsively to get his family to the park.

programme.title: National Lampoon's European Vacation
programme.desc: After winning a European vacation on a game show, Clark Griswold convinces his reluctant family to accompany him. His wife, Ellen, is excited, but daughter Audrey is reluctant to leave her boyfriend behind, while teen son Rusty dreams of meeting girls. After arriving in London, the clan encounters one disaster after another as they travel through France, Germany and Italy, while Clark's attempts to cheer everyone up make things worse.

programme.title: Vegas Vacation
programme.desc: The Griswolds are off on a family outing to Las Vegas, where they each have their own misadventures. Hapless dad Clark Griswold immediately starts losing money at blackjack, while his wife, Ellen, develops a crush on lounge performer Wayne Newton. Elsewhere, young Rusty is enthusiastically playing dice, and his sister, Audrey, winds up in seedy nightclubs. Can the family reunite and stay out of trouble?

programme.title: National Lampoon's Christmas Vacation
programme.desc: As the holidays approach, Clark Griswold (Chevy Chase) wants to have a perfect family Christmas, so he pesters his wife, Ellen (Beverly D'Angelo), and children, as he tries to make sure everything is in line, including the tree and house decorations. However, things go awry quickly. His hick cousin, Eddie (Randy Quaid), and his family show up unplanned and start living in their camper on the Griswold property. Even worse, Clark's employers renege on the holiday bonus he needs.

programme.title: Hook
programme.desc: When his young children are abducted by his old nemesis, Capt. Hook (Dustin Hoffman) middle-aged lawyer Peter Banning (Robin Williams) returns to his magical origins as Peter Pan. Peter must revisit a foggy past in which he abandoned Neverland for family life, leaving Tinkerbell (Julia Roberts) and the Lost Boys to fend for themselves. Given their bitterness toward Peter for growing up -- and their allegiance to their new leader, Rufio -- the old gang may not be happy to see him.

programme.title: Selena
programme.desc: In this biographical drama, Selena Quintanilla (Jennifer Lopez) is born into a musical Mexican-American family in Texas. Her father, Abraham (Edward James Olmos), realizes that his young daughter is talented and begins performing with her at small venues. She finds success and falls for her guitarist, Chris Perez (Jon Seda), who draws the ire of her father. Seeking mainstream stardom, Selena begins recording an English-language album which, tragically, she would never complete.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Jr. enrolls in the Rapacademy and signs a shady contract with Michael's archenemy, Bobby Shaw, and he must get out of it.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Jr. and Vanessa plan their wedding, but they quickly realize that a compromise must be made in order to bring their two families together.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Jay is envious of the attention that she sees newlywed Vanessa getting from Jr., and she wishes that Michael would act the same way toward her.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Jr. becomes obnoxious about winning after Vanessa buys him a foosball game, prompting Michael to try to teach him a lesson about being a good winner.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael feels neglected when Jay spends a lot of time studying, so he decides to tutor her, with less than stellar results.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Jay insists that Michael buy her a gift for Sweetheart's Day, so he decides to base the price of her gift on her attitude towards him.

programme.title: Selena
programme.desc: In this biographical drama, Selena Quintanilla (Jennifer Lopez) is born into a musical Mexican-American family in Texas. Her father, Abraham (Edward James Olmos), realizes that his young daughter is talented and begins performing with her at small venues. She finds success and falls for her guitarist, Chris Perez (Jon Seda), who draws the ire of her father. Seeking mainstream stardom, Selena begins recording an English-language album which, tragically, she would never complete.

programme.title: Death at a Funeral
programme.desc: Preparing for a funeral is never pleasant, but for Aaron, it is shaping up to be the worst day of his life. Sibling rivalry, meddling family members, and a little stranger with a big secret threaten to blow the lid off the coffin when Aaron struggles to give his late father a proper memorial.

programme.title: Coming to America
programme.desc: Prince Akeem (Eddie Murphy) is the prince of a wealthy African country and wants for nothing, except a wife who will love him in spite of his title. To escape an arranged marriage, Akeem flees to America accompanied by his persnickety sidekick, Semmi (Arsenio Hall), to find his queen. Disguised as a foreign student working in fast food, he romances Lisa (Shari Headley), but struggles with revealing his true identity to her and his marital intentions to his king father (James Earl Jones).

programme.title: First Sunday
programme.desc: Petty thieves Durell (Ice Cube) and LeeJohn (Tracy Morgan) face a big problem: The two must come up with $17,000 in one week, or Durell will no longer be able to see his son. The goofy scoundrels embark on a haphazard plan to rob the neighborhood church, but they find the mission trickier than expected. When they arrive, they discover that somebody equally disreputable has already had his hand in the coffers. Now, they must trace the money to a group of parishioners.

programme.title: Missing in Action
programme.desc: Colonel James Braddock (Chuck Norris) survives a brutal stint in a Vietnamese POW camp, but he believes that even after the war ends enemy forces are still secretly holding American men captive. Eventually, he is tapped by the president to go overseas and search for U.S. soldiers who went missing years ago. Once in Saigon, Braddock learns that his suspicions are correct, so he teams up with reckless fellow veteran Tuck (M. Emmet Walsh) and stages a violent rescue mission in the jungle.

programme.title: Missing in Action 2: The Beginning
programme.desc: Ten years after being captured by sadistic Vietnamese Col. Yin (Oh Soon-tek) in 1972, Col. James Braddock (Chuck Norris) and his men are still prisoners deep in the jungle. Resigned to being abandoned by his government, Capt. David Nester (Steven Williams) has become Yin's henchman, while the rest of the soldiers remain strong. Despite constant torture, Braddock refuses to sign a confession of cowardice, biding his time until he can escape and take revenge.

programme.title: Braddock: Missing in Action III
programme.desc: While Col. James Braddock (Chuck Norris) was serving in Vietnam, he fell in love with a woman named Lin Tan Cang (Miki Kim). However, he thought her to be dead and returned to the United States without her. Years later, Braddock is told that Lin is alive -- along with her son that he fathered. Acting against a direct order from the CIA, and with the help of a foreign missionary (Yehuda Efroni), he returns to Vietnam to find his family, taking on a communist general (Aki Aleong) along the way.

programme.title: Tekken
programme.desc: Jin (Jon Foo) trains to fight Anvil after he witnesses him murdering his mother.

programme.title: The Delta Force
programme.desc: Five years after Maj. Scott McCoy resigned from the U.S. Delta Force due to bureaucracy issues, he returns with Col. Alexander to take down Lebanese terrorists who have hijacked a Boeing 707. Terrorist leader Abdul Rifi takes the crew and passengers hostage as he reroutes the plane to Beirut. When McCoy and Alexander attempt to save the hostages once the plane lands, they are forced to battle a terrorist group that's larger than expected.

programme.title: The Condemned
programme.desc: Jack Conrad is a death-row inmate awaiting execution in a Central American jail when a TV producer buys him and takes him to a remote island. There, Jack and nine other prisoners learn they are to fight each other to the death, with freedom as the prize for the sole survivor. The producer plans to broadcast the event live and uncensored over the Internet.

programme.title: Invasion of the Body Snatchers
programme.desc: This remake of the classic horror film is set in San Francisco. Matthew Bennell assumes that when a friend complains of her husband's strange mood, it's a marital issue. However, he begins to worry as more people report similar observations. His concern is confirmed when writer Jack Bellicec and his wife discover a mutated corpse. Besieged by an invisible enemy, Bennell must work quickly before the city is consumed.

programme.title: Knowing
programme.desc: Fifty years after it was buried in a time capsule, a schoolgirl's cryptic document falls into the hands of Caleb Koestler, the son of professor John Koestler (Nicolas Cage). John figures out that the encoded message accurately lists every major disaster from the past five decades, and predicts three future calamities -- one a global cataclysm. When his warnings fall on deaf ears, John enlists the help of the prophetic author's daughter and granddaughter to try to avert the ultimate disaster.

programme.title: Bangkok Dangerous
programme.desc: Remorseless assassin Joe (Nicolas Cage) is in Thailand to complete a series of contract killings for a crime boss called Surat (Nirattisai Kaljaruek). He hires a street punk named Kong (Shahkrit Yamnam) to run errands for him, all the while planning to kill the youth at the conclusion of his assignment. Instead, Joe becomes Kong's unlikely mentor, and begins a tentative romance with a local shop girl. But as Joe begins to let his guard down, Surat decides it is time to clean house.

programme.title: Mom and Dad
programme.desc: A teenage girl and her little brother try to survive a wild 24 hours during which a mass hysteria of unknown origins causes parents to turn violently on their own children.

programme.title: Primal
programme.desc: Hunter and collector Frank Walsh expects a big payday after bagging a priceless white jaguar for a zoo. But the ship bearing Frank's precious cargo has another predator -- a political assassin facing extradition to America. When the prisoner manages to break free, Walsh must utilize his expert skills to capture the dangerous killer -- not dead, but alive.

programme.title: Tekken
programme.desc: Jin (Jon Foo) trains to fight Anvil after he witnesses him murdering his mother.

programme.title: The Director's Chair
programme.desc: Director Francis Ford Coppola talks about starting Zoetrope, the influence of family, and creating "The Godfather," "The Conversation" and "Apocalypse Now."

programme.title: The Director's Chair
programme.desc: Luis Valdez discusses his journey from migrant farm worker to director; he also talks about the founding of Tratros Campesinos, making "Zoot Suit" and "La Bamba."

programme.title: The Director's Chair
programme.desc: Luis Valdez discusses his journey from migrant farm worker to director; he also talks about the founding of Tratros Campesinos, making "Zoot Suit" and "La Bamba."

programme.title: Rebel Without a Crew: The Robert Rodriguez Film School
programme.desc: Robert breaks down how he approaches low-budget screenwriting and teaches the audience how to start their own screenplays by using his notecard method.

programme.title: Harley Davidson and the Marlboro Man
programme.desc: In this action movie, tough biker Harley-Davidson (Mickey Rourke) teams up with his cowboy-hat-wearing buddy known as the Marlboro Man (Don Johnson) to help save the bar of a mutual friend. Enacting a plan to rob an armored bank vehicle, the two are surprised to find that they've heisted a massive shipment of a new drug. Soon the corrupt bank head, Chance Wilder (Tom Sizemore), sends trained killers to take out Harley and Marlboro, with the duo fighting for their lives.

programme.title: Masters of the Universe
programme.desc: When the evil Skeletor (Frank Langella) finds a mysterious power called the Cosmic Key, he becomes nearly invincible. However, courageous warrior He-Man (Dolph Lundgren) locates inventor Gwildor (Billy Barty), who created the Key and has another version of it. During a battle, one of the Keys is transported to Earth, where it is found by teenagers Julie (Courteney Cox) and Kevin (Robert Duncan McNeill). Now both He-Man and Skeletor's forces arrive on Earth searching for the potent weapon.

programme.title: A Force of One
programme.desc: A veteran (Chuck Norris) teaches martial arts to a California detective (Jennifer O'Neill) and her colleagues, and joins them on a case.

programme.title: From Dusk Till Dawn
programme.desc: Seth and Richie's organization is infiltrated by an enemy fixated on destroying the Geckos, the Lords and all culebras.

programme.title: From Dusk Till Dawn
programme.desc: Seth and Richie seek help from Santanico; Freddie and Ximena have an encounter with Brasa.

programme.title: From Dusk Till Dawn
programme.desc: Freddie Gonzalez teams up with an old enemy; Seth and Richie track down an ancient hunter.

programme.title: From Dusk Till Dawn
programme.desc: Ranger Freddie Gonzalez teams with an old enemy; the Geckos must defend against the Jaguar Warriors.

programme.title: From Dusk Till Dawn
programme.desc: Seth and his team protect civilians from cannibal attacks.

programme.title: From Dusk Till Dawn
programme.desc: Richie wakes up in an abandoned asylum after being abducted; Seth goes to save Richie.

programme.title: From Dusk Till Dawn
programme.desc: The team falls victim to a female Xibalban demon.

programme.title: From Dusk Till Dawn
programme.desc: Santanico returns with a secret and leads the Geckos to Lord Venganza.

programme.title: From Dusk Till Dawn
programme.desc: The Geckos are going after Amaru, as she plots to regain her true form and open the gates of Hell.

programme.title: BloodRayne
programme.desc: In 18th-century Romania, after spending much of her life in a traveling circus, human-vampire hybrid Rayne (Kristanna Loken) escapes and plots to take down her evil vampire father, Kagan (Ben Kingsley). When she's discovered by three vampire hunters, Vladimir (Michael Madsen), Katarin (Michelle Rodriguez) and Sebastian (Matt Davis), she manages to convince them to spare her life and join her cause. But slaying a vampire as powerful as Kagan will be no easy task.

programme.title: Boogeyman
programme.desc: As a young boy, Tim (Aaron Murphy) witnesses the horrifying event of his father (Charles Mesure) being dragged away by the boogeyman. Despite the reassurances of his mother (Lucy Lawless) that the boogeyman is not real, he is never the same afterward. Years later, Tim (Barry Watson) manages to create a normal life for himself -- though he lives without closets and keeps his mattress on the floor. But when he learns of his mother's death, Tim must return home to face his childhood trauma.

programme.title: Boogeyman 2
programme.desc: A killer terrorizes patients at a mental institution where a woman (Danielle Savre) tries to cure her fear of the boogeyman.

programme.title: Boogeyman 3
programme.desc: An evil entity terrorizes a student (Erin Cahill) and her friends on a college campus.

programme.title: The Texas Chainsaw Massacre Part 2
programme.desc: Chainsaw-wielding maniac Leatherface (Bill Johnson) is up to his cannibalistic ways once again, along with the rest of his twisted clan, including the equally disturbed Chop-Top (Bill Moseley). This time, the masked killer has set his sights on pretty disc jockey Vanita Stretch Brock (Caroline Williams), who teams up with Texas lawman Lefty Enright (Dennis Hopper) to battle the psychopath and his family deep within their lair, a macabre abandoned amusement park.

programme.title: Texas Chainsaw 3D
programme.desc: Decades ago, residents of Newt, Texas, long suspected that the Sawyer family was responsible for the disappearances of many people. When their suspicions finally were confirmed, vigilantes torched the Sawyer compound and killed every member of the family -- or so they thought. Much later, a young woman named Heather (Alexandra Daddario) learns that she has inherited Texas property from an unknown relative, and she is unaware of horrors that await in the mansion's dank cellar.

programme.title: A Force of One
programme.desc: A veteran (Chuck Norris) teaches martial arts to a California detective (Jennifer O'Neill) and her colleagues, and joins them on a case.

programme.title: GOD TV Together Podcast
programme.desc: Guests discuss contemporary issues from a religious perspective, emphasizing the importance of seeking the blessings of the Almighty.

programme.title: Concepts of Faith With Charles Capps
programme.sub-title: Concepts of Faith With Charles Capps
programme.desc: Charles and Annette Capps teach lessons of faith and the power of the spoken and written word.

programme.title: Life Today With James Robison
programme.desc: James Robison is a former preacher who changed directions in his life several years ago and began hosting this television show alongside his wife, Betty, in order to reach out to help more people.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: Dr. David Jeremiah shares the practical messages behind Christianity and helps people to discover their own turning points in their relationship with God.

programme.title: Jewish Voice with Jonathan Bernis
programme.desc: Rabbi Jonathan Bernis of Jewish Voice Ministries provides valuable insights into the Jewish roots of Christianity. Is Israel the aggressor in the Middle East? What is the truth?

programme.title: Kenneth Copeland
programme.desc: You've got the victory; Kenneth Copeland explains how Jesus gave you His authority over death; be reminded of the power and victory you have through Christ's loving sacrifice!

programme.title: Believer's Walk of Faith With Bill Winston
programme.sub-title: Believer's Walk of Faith With Bill Winston
programme.desc: Fighter pilot turned minister, Dr. Winston shares his way of finding the strength to face fears, failures and other problems or concerns by taking the path of faith.

programme.title: Joseph Prince
programme.sub-title: No Root, No Fruit: The Secret to a Fruitful Life
programme.desc: Discover God's plan for you to prosper and bless others, even in tough times.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer Enjoying Everyday Life

Banding together, the co-workers must use their wits to make it out alive amid all the chaos.

programme.desc: The Olympic flame is burning bright! Host Tarik and Abe are joined in studio by SBJ's Olympic reporter Rachel Axon and gold medalist Thea LaFond, who discuss their Olympic experiences and dig into the development, logistics, and evolution of the world's greatest athletic events.
